examples: Unbeknown to her they had organized a surprise party.
It appears that unbeknown to Bolwell, the future (much like President Obama) has already arrived.
Unbeknown to them, the "scrap" contained a highly radioactive source used to treat cancer patients.
Unbeknown to most advertisers, ad servers tend to be owned by the recipients of their growing budgets.
Unbeknown to her, the Mass General emergency department staff had already sent an edible gift of their own.
